competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Leandro Paredes (Argentina).

events.description: 莱安德罗·帕雷德斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Jude Bellingham (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Enzo Fernández (Argentina).
Elliot Anderson (England) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Elliot Anderson (England) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, England. Conceded by Alexis Mac Allister.
Dangerous play by Marc Guéhi (England).
Foul by Reece James (England).
Foul by Giuliano Simeone (Argentina).
Enzo Fernández (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match (Argentina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Offside, Argentina. Giuliano Simeone is caught offside.
Foul by Giuliano Simeone (Argentina).
Offside, Argentina. Lionel Messi is caught offside.
Nicolás Tagliafico (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

relatedPlayer.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jude Bellingham (England).
Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Djed Spence.
Foul by Giuliano Simeone (Argentina).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Giuliano Simeone (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Enzo Fernández (Argentina).
Attempt missed. John Stones (England) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 约翰·斯通斯射门偏出。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Giuliano Simeone (Argentina).
Foul by Nahuel Molina (Argentina).
Lionel Messi (Argentina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Elliot Anderson (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 艾略特·安德森吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Leandro Paredes.

events.description: 梅西射门被封堵。 莱安德罗·帕雷德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high following a set piece situation.

events.description: 恩佐·费尔南德斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lisandro Martínez (Argentina).

events.description: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Lisandro Martínez (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Enzo Fernández (Argentina).
Fourth official has announced 3 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, England. Morgan Rogers is caught offside.
Dangerous play by Leandro Paredes (Argentina).

events.description: 莱安德罗·帕雷德斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, England. Conceded by Enzo Fernández.
First Half ends, England 0, Argentina 0.
Second Half begins England 0, Argentina 0.

Attempt saved. Julián Alvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Giuliano Simeone with a headed pass.

events.description: 阿尔瓦雷斯射正。 朱利亚诺·西蒙尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Julián Alvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Lionel Messi.

events.description: 阿尔瓦雷斯射门偏出。 梅西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Jordan Pickford.
Foul by Cristian Romero (Argentina).

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Cristian Romero (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Cristian Romero (Argentina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Leandro Paredes (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the left. Assisted by Giuliano Simeone.

events.description: 莱安德罗·帕雷德斯射门偏出。 朱利亚诺·西蒙尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! England 1, Argentina 0. Anthony Gordon (England) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Morgan Rogers with a cross.

events.description: 安东尼·哥顿破门。 比分 1-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Djed Spence.
Attempt missed. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Leandro Paredes.

events.description: 恩佐·费尔南德斯射门偏出。 莱安德罗·帕雷德斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Leandro Paredes.

events.description: 尼科·冈萨雷斯替补登场，换下莱安德罗·帕雷德斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Declan Rice (England) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Emiliano Martínez (Argentina). Assisted by Reece James.

events.description: 德克兰·赖斯射正。 里斯·詹姆斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Declan Rice.

events.description: 凯恩射门被封堵。 德克兰·赖斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Nicolás Tagliafico (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Elliot Anderson.
Attempt saved. Nico González (Argentina) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Jordan Pickford (England). Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross.

events.description: 尼科·冈萨雷斯射正。 梅西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Cristian Romero (Argentina).

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

player.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特
